entities.name: CONSTRAINTS TO ADAPTATION
entities.description: Factors that hinder the ability of human and natural systems to adapt to climate change

entities.name: LIMITS TO ADAPTATION
entities.description: Thresholds beyond which human and natural systems can no longer successfully adapt to climate change

entities.name: HUMAN SYSTEMS
entities.description: Social and organizational structures created by humans

entities.name: NATURAL SYSTEMS
entities.description: Biological and physical systems occurring in nature

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns that necessitate adaptation

entities.name: SYSTEMATIC REVIEW
entities.description: A comprehensive review of 1,682 academic studies to identify patterns in adaptation constraints and limits

entities.name: IPCC
entities.description: The Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change, which provides definitions for constraints and limits to adaptation

entities.name: CENTRAL AND SOUTH AMERICA
entities.description: Region reporting greater constraints and both hard and soft limits to adaptation

entities.name: SMALL ISLANDS
entities.description: Region reporting greater constraints and both hard and soft limits to adaptation

entities.name: HARD LIMITS
entities.description: Absolute thresholds beyond which adaptation is no longer possible

entities.name: SOFT LIMITS
entities.description: Limits to adaptation that could potentially be overcome with more resources or political will

entities.name: TECHNOLOGICAL ADAPTATION
entities.description: Adaptation responses based on the application of technology

entities.name: INFRASTRUCTURAL ADAPTATION
entities.description: Adaptation responses based on the development of physical infrastructure

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM-BASED ADAPTATION
entities.description: Adaptation responses based on the use of biodiversity and ecosystem services

entities.name: INDIVIDUALS
entities.description: Human beings who face economic and socio-cultural constraints to adaptation

entities.name: HOUSEHOLDS
entities.description: Social units consisting of individuals living together who face economic and socio-cultural constraints

entities.name: ECONOMIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Financial barriers that inhibit adaptation responses

entities.name: SOCIO-CULTURAL CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Social and cultural barriers that inhibit adaptation responses

entities.name: BEHAVIORAL ADAPTATION RESPONSES
entities.description: Adaptation actions involving changes in human behavior

entities.name: FINANCE CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Constraints related to the availability and allocation of funding for adaptation

entities.name: GOVERNANCE CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Constraints related to the management and oversight of adaptation efforts

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Constraints related to the rules and structures of organizations

entities.name: POLICY CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Constraints related to government regulations and policy frameworks
